view.title: Validate persona scenario #4
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of onboarding new staff with a corporate template, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the scenario behavior or its expected results. The linked use case mentions the need for a credential request object, yet no actual evidence of such an object being created or linked is present, leading to an inability to determine if the scenario is supported or if it produces a clear failure report. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to a lack of concrete evidence to assert a definitive outcome.
